name: date
description: Display or set date and time

options.description: Set the kernel's value for daylight saving time
Use specified format for input instead of the default [[[mm]dd]HH]MM[[cc]yy][.ss] format

arg.name: input_fmt
arg.description: The format with which to parse the new date value

options.description: Don't try to set the date
Only set time on the current machine, instead of all machines in the local group
Use RFC 2822 date and time output format
Print the date and time represented by the specified number of seconds since the Epoch

arg.name: seconds
arg.description: Number of seconds since the Epoch (00:00:00 UTC, January 1, 1970)

options.description: Set the system's value for minutes west of GMT
Display or set the date in UTC (Coordinated Universal) time
Adjust and print (but don't set) the second, minute, hour, month day, week day, month, or year according to val

args.name: new_time OR output_fmt
args.description: New_time: [[[mm]dd]HH]MM[[cc]yy][.ss], output_fmt: '+' followed by user-defined format string
